title: Create dummy product catalog data, TypeScript types, and helper utilities
completion_summary: 12 dummy products + types + pure helpers done
acceptance_criteria: Product TypeScript type includes id, name, category, price, description, image placeholder, and stock flag.
Dummy catalog contains at least 12 products across Guitars, Parts, Accessories, and Violin categories.
Helper functions provide category list, price formatting, and search/filter logic as pure functions.
Data is static/dummy only and contains no backend API references.
Types are shared between store, cart, and product detail components.
